Name: FlexibleSphere
Notes: An object capable of shrinking and growing between two sizes.

Obj_arg0.Name: Maximum Scale
Obj_arg0.Description: Maximum scale of the object, multiplied by 10000. Default is 10000.

Obj_arg1.Name: Minimum Scale
Obj_arg1.Description: Minimum scale of the object, multiplied by 10000. Default is 1000.

Obj_arg2.Name: Scale Rate
Obj_arg2.Description: Scaling rate of the object, multiplied by 10000. Default is 20.

Obj_arg3.Name: Vanish After Shrinking?
Obj_arg3.Description: If set to 1, the object disappears after reaching the minimum scale.

Obj_arg4.Name: Useless
Obj_arg4.Description: Read but never used for anything.

SW_DEAD.Description: Gets activated when it vanishes. Obj_arg3 must be set to 1 for this to be possible.

SW_A.Description: Enables the shrinking and growing once activated.
